cards.name: Numenor turned to Shadow
cards.quote: In the shadowed halls of Numenor, hope crumbled like ancient stone.
cards.actionEffect: Even Núnmenor bowed, in the end. Remove Halted <sprite name="halted"> from a target allied commander; they gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged">, and enemies in their hex gain Fear <sprite name="fear">.

cards.name: TheDrownOfTheStone
cards.quote: The waters whisper secrets of lost kings and shattered dreams.
cards.actionEffect: If any Free People character holds a Palantir, remove it from the character and hide it in a random water hex.

cards.name: Mouth of Sauron
cards.quote: I speak for the Dark Lord; his will shall be done.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 25 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: Black Numenoreans
cards.quote: Fallen from grace, they wield darkness as their blade.

cards.name: Nurn Cavalry
cards.quote: With speed and fury, they ride like the storm itself.

cards.name: Archers
cards.quote: Silently they watch, arrows nocked and ready, guardians of the shadows.

cards.name: Light Cavalry
cards.quote: Swift as the wind, they strike like lightning, leaving naught but echoes.

cards.name: Men At Arms
cards.quote: With honor in their hearts, they march forth, champions of their lords.

cards.name: Spearmen
cards.quote: Braced against the tide, they stand resolute, a wall of steel and valor.

cards.name: Swordmen
cards.quote: Swordmen stand in line, and the dark breaks on them.

cards.name: Rhun
cards.quote: Rhun is a far shore of smoke and mounted dust, where distant thunder gathers.

cards.name: Khand
cards.quote: A land of scorching sands and fierce warriors, where honor is forged in battle.

cards.name: Nurn
cards.quote: The air hangs heavy with the scent of toil and the whispers of forgotten lives.

cards.name: Adunaphel
cards.quote: The night is long, and I am its harbinger.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 20 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: Akhorahil
cards.quote: The whispers of darkness guide my hand; I shall not fail.
cards.actionEffect: Apply ArcaneInsight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (2 turns) to a random controlled character.

cards.name: Ji Indur
cards.quote: In the shadows, power waits; I will claim it for my master.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the random enemy settlement for 2 turn(s).

cards.name: JugRijeisha
cards.quote: JugRijeisha guards its own heat and dust, a place where the desert has learned to keep secrets.

cards.name: Kal Nargil
cards.quote: Kal Nargil grips the hills in black silence, where no bird lingers long.

cards.name: KhandAmu
cards.quote: KhandAmu drinks the sun and gives back only heat, dust, and hard intent.

cards.name: Lugarlur
cards.quote: Lugarlur crouches beneath the old shadow, waiting with the patience of iron.

cards.name: Luglurak
cards.quote: Luglurak crouches beneath the old shadow, waiting with the patience of iron.

cards.name: Wathduin
cards.quote: Wathduin leans into the wind with a grim pride that refuses to be bent.

cards.name: AnKaragmir
cards.quote: AnKaragmir is a dark hold of old metal and older grudges, and the stone remembers every strike.

cards.name: BaradHarn
cards.quote: BaradHarn lifts a grim tower over the waste, and its shadow reaches farther than its walls.

cards.name: CarasMirilond
cards.quote: CarasMirilond glows with a pale remnant of grandeur, though time has thinned its banners.

cards.name: CarasTolfalas
cards.quote: CarasTolfalas clings to the sea-wind with the stubborn grace of stone weathered but unbroken.

cards.name: Havens of Umbar
cards.quote: The Havens of Umbar smile to the sea like a bright knife hidden in silk.

cards.name: Isigir
cards.quote: Isigir feels like a gate forgotten by empire and remembered by none but crows.

cards.name: Kas Shadoul
cards.quote: Kas Shadoul stands under a heat-hazed sky, and its walls seem to hoard the dayÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s last breath.

cards.name: KasShafra
cards.quote: KasShafra clings to the edge of the southern heat, where even shadow seems worn thin.

cards.name: LagariOrath
cards.quote: LagariOrath sits under a low sky, and the wind there sounds almost like counsel.

cards.name: Laorki
cards.quote: Laorki keeps its own counsel, where the earth is old and the paths are few.

cards.name: Methir
cards.quote: Methir keeps the old road under a guarded sky, and every stone there seems to have a watcher.

cards.name: Neburcha
cards.quote: Neburcha shelters a stillness that feels earned, as though hardship had taken root and stayed.

cards.name: Ovatharac
cards.quote: Ovatharac keeps the feel of a place where power once walked and still leaves its footprints.

cards.name: Pellardur
cards.quote: Pellardur stands between sea and memory, a place where old trade routes left more than footprints.

cards.name: Sturlurtsa Khand
cards.quote: Sturlurtsa Khand keeps the hard memory of a road where riders once vanished into dust.

cards.name: Southron Scout
cards.quote: Silent as the night, I see all and fear none in this vast land.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the random enemy settlement for 1 turn(s).

cards.name: Sangarunya
cards.quote: Strength lies not just in steel, but in the heart that wields it.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 3 lc <sprite name="lc"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Herumor
cards.quote: In darkness I thrive, for the shadows are my allies.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 15 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: Haruth Rammam
cards.quote: The sands whisper of glory, and I shall let none forget my name.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 2 hi <sprite name="hi"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Castamir
cards.quote: The tides of power shift, and I shall be their master.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 20 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: Avas of Igath
cards.quote: In the heat of battle, I find my true purpose and sharpen my resolve.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 15 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: Angamaite
cards.quote: A blade is only as true as the heart that wields it.
cards.actionEffect: Sabotage the port <sprite name="port"> of the random visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: Uvatha
cards.quote: In the shadow of the Dark Lord, I carve my path through fear and flame.
cards.actionEffect: Recruit 3 lc <sprite name="lc"> to a controlled army.

cards.name: Mangonels
cards.quote: With a great roar, we unleash fate upon our foes.

cards.name: Angulion
cards.quote: From the depths of despair, I rise as a storm upon the horizon.
cards.actionEffect: Grant 10 XP to all controlled armies.

cards.name: NearHarad
cards.quote: Where the sun scorches the earth, life thrives in the shadows.

cards.name: Umbar
cards.quote: The shadowy shores of Umbar whisper tales of treachery and lost ships.

cards.name: Southron Assassins
cards.quote: Silent shadows, they strike without warning from the sands.

cards.name: Camel Riders
cards.quote: With the sun at their backs, they charge across the sands like a storm.

cards.name: Corsairs Of Umbar
cards.quote: From the shadows of Umbar, they strike with blades dipped in treachery.

cards.name: Haradrim Cavalry
cards.quote: Hooves pound the earth, echoing the call of conquest in the desert winds.

cards.name: Haradrim Infantry
cards.quote: They stand as a wall of iron, resolute against the tides of war.

cards.name: Khand Easterlings
cards.quote: Warriors of the cold north, their spirits burn bright with the fire of battle.

cards.name: Mumakils
cards.quote: Titans of the battlefield, their rampage reshapes the very land.

cards.name: Southrons
cards.quote: With fierce hearts, they tread the sands, claiming the day as their own.

cards.name: Umbar Cavalry
cards.quote: Swift like the tide, they crash upon their foes with relentless fury.

cards.name: Mumakan Spearmen
cards.quote: Their spears are as relentless as the desert sun.

cards.name: The Deceiver
cards.quote: I came bearing gifts of knowledge and craft. That they called them Rings of Power was already the beginning of their ruin.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease loyalty <sprite name="loyalty"> by 25 on a visible enemy settlement.

cards.name: DreadOfTheNoldor
cards.quote: A chill descends, for the light of the Eldar grows dim.
cards.actionEffect: The dread of the Noldor is not remembered without cause. Elf characters in radius 2 with low Mage are displaced 1 hex westward and lose Hidden <sprite name="hidden">; the caster gains Hidden on forest or coast.

cards.name: Luglurak Dark Magic
cards.quote: Fear is a weapon sharper than any blade.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy characters in radius 1 gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Scents of the Haradrim
cards.quote: A whisper of poison carried on the winds of war strikes true.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage and apply Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned"> (2 turns).

cards.name: TheLureOfTheSenses
cards.quote: In the haze of battle, the senses deceive, and danger lurks unseen.
cards.actionEffect: Block target enemy character for 1 turn. If it is a Maia, block it for 3 turns.

cards.name: FarHarad
cards.quote: The lands of FarHarad stretch under the weight of sun and sand.

cards.name: Caravans
cards.quote: Caravans know the price of every road.
cards.actionEffect: Sell up to 3 available resources and gain 25% extra <sprite name="gold"> versus normal sale value.

cards.name: Sand Storm
cards.quote: A tempest of sand engulfs the land, blinding friend and foe alike.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all non-Southron units on desert tiles.

cards.name: Pirates
cards.quote: The sea calls to us, and we answer with steel and sails.

cards.name: RageOfUlmo
cards.quote: The deep remembers wrath when Ulmo stirs.
cards.actionEffect: Ulmo does not forget the sea’s sovereignty. All naval <sprite name="ws"> units on water and shore tiles take damage and are Halted <sprite name="halted">.

cards.name: ElvesGoingWest
cards.quote: The shores of the West beckon, but despair holds them fast.
cards.actionEffect: The sea-longing cannot be denied forever. Choose 1 Elf in radius 3; they are moved 1 hex westward, gain Despair <sprite name="despair">, and lose Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and their action this turn.

cards.name: Fury of Ulmo
cards.quote: When Ulmo stirs, the deep remembers wrath.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all navy or embarked <sprite name="ws"> units.

cards.name: A Knife in the Dark
cards.quote: Fear lurks in shadows, where the unseen blade strikes true.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned"> (2 turns) and Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).
